name: 暴力護花＋帶傷歸來
description: Ryan暴打搶走助聽器的Paul，帶傷把助聽器送回給Andrea。血跡與溫柔的對比形成強烈視覺衝擊。
tags: 暴力場面的腎上腺素＋受傷男主溫柔遞還助聽器的反差萌

examples.drama_title: 💗No One Dared Kiss the Bully CEO—Until a Rural Girl Did,Then He Can’t Stop Spoiling Her!#drama #ceo
examples.excerpt: Ryan, that's enough. Are you really going to beat him to death? / Did you get my hearing aid back? / They are just minor injuries. / Ryan, why are you being so kind to me?
examples.context: 暴力場面的腎上腺素＋受傷男主溫柔遞還助聽器的反差萌
